title: Justicia aphelandroides
taxonomy: Justicia aphelandroides is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Justicia, which comprises about 600 species of plants. The family Acanthaceae is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or acanthus family. This family includes a wide range of plants, from tropical herbs to woody shrubs and trees. Further classification of Justicia aphelandroides may involve its order, class, and kingdom, which can be determined by its botanical characteristics.

As for Justicia adhatoda, its therapeutic properties include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieve respiratory issues, and even help lower blood pressure.

Justicia adhatoda is also used to treat fever, bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems.
